/usr/bin/cc -std=c99 -Wall -O2 -g   -DPICOTLS_USE_DTRACE=1 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/cli.dir/t/cli.c.o CMakeFiles/cli.dir/lib/pembase64.c.o -o cli  libpicotls-openssl.a libpicotls-core.a /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libresolv.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib
